# FishFYI Embed Widget

> Embeddable FishFYI widgets for any website. Zero dependencies, Shadow DOM isolation, 4 themes (light/dark/sepia/auto).

## Quick Start

Add to any HTML page:
- Script: <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fishfyi-embed@1/dist/embed.min.js"></script>

## Links

- Main site: https://fishfyi.com
- Widget docs: https://widget.fishfyi.com
- npm: https://www.npmjs.com/package/fishfyi-embed
- GitHub: https://github.com/fyipedia/fishfyi-embed
- API: https://fishfyi.com/developers/

## Nature FYI Widget Family

- [SpeciesFYI Widget](https://widget.speciesfyi.com)
- [BirdFYI Widget](https://widget.birdfyi.com)
- [PlantFYI Widget](https://widget.plantfyi.com)
- [DinoFYI Widget](https://widget.dinofyi.com)

## Part of FYIPedia

Open-source developer tools ecosystem — https://fyipedia.com
